✦ about // in depth

kailyn brown

software developer — building interfaces and breaking conventions

kailyn brown

aspiring engineer building intuitive solutions

location ··· cincinnati, OH
focus ··· backend software development
status ··· currently interning @ kroger tech & digital

📂 README.md

Motivated and detail-oriented IT major seeking opportunities to apply and expand programming, problem-solving, and technical skills in collaborative environments. Currently working as a Software Developer Intern at Kroger in the Search & Personalization department.

My journey into tech started with a personal challenge project where I taught myself Swift/Xcode and created a mobile app to assist patients with aphasia—an experience that showed me the power of technology to help others. That project sparked my passion for building software that makes a real difference.

When I’m not coding, you can find me exploring creative outlets like photography and video editing, modding older devices (such as my Nintendo 3DS, PS Vita, Wii U, and iPhone 4), riding in my VW Beetle, or tinkering with my custom-built PC.

📅 changelog.md

2026

Transferred to University of Cincinnati

Pivoted towards IT studies closer to home.

2026

Kroger Software Dev Internship

Joined the Search & Personalization team, working on code that supports millions of queries a day.

2024

Started at Bryn Mawr College

Began working towards a Computer Science degree in Philadelphia, PA

2024

Graduated from The Seven Hills School

Completed Honors and Advanced Placement curriculum in Cincinnati, OH.

✨ fun facts

  • Self-taught Swift/Xcode to build an app for aphasia patients
  • Worked at the highest-volume Graeter's Ice Cream store in the franchise
  • Built my own custom gaming/development PC
  • Have an extensive collection of modded retro devices
  • Participated in CISV international exchange programs
  • Performed in multiple theatre productions
  • Volunteered at a no-kill animal rescue, training other volunteers

resume & experience

💼 experience & education

work experience

Software Developer Intern
@ Kroger
Summer 2025 – Present

Working on search and personalization systems that help millions of customers find products and receive personalized recommendations.

  • Contributing to search infrastructure used by millions of daily users
  • Deploying code to production and monitoring large-scale system performance
  • Working with Kafka message processing systems
  • Gaining hands-on experience in large-scale software development
Kitchen Support
@ Bryn Mawr College Dining Services
Aug 2024 – May 2025

Supported daily food service operations including preparation, serving, and maintaining cleanliness.

  • Collaborated with team members for efficient dining operations
  • Managed multiple responsibilities in fast-paced environment
Team Member
@ Graeter's Ice Cream
May 2022 – Aug 2024, May 2025 – Aug 2025

Provided excellent customer service at the highest volume store in the Graeter's franchise.

  • Served customers at the busiest Graeter's location
  • Operated register, took orders, and prepared desserts
  • Maintained positive attitude while working as part of a team
Volunteer
@ HEARTT Animal Rescue
June 2021 – Aug 2021

Volunteered at local no-kill animal refuge and adoption center.

  • Cleaned and sanitized animal habitats
  • Trained newer volunteers on procedures
  • Organized supplies and provided animal care

education

B.S. Computer Science
@ University of Cincinnati
2025 – 2028
